subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to God, may God uphold thee! I implore God, the Ever-Living
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @the power of words; of speech, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
